name: Line readiness check
description: Stop-go checklist for product availability, equipment readiness, station setup, 86 risk, and any blocker that should delay the open.
source_ref: core-v2: readiness tools should create real stop/go decisions, not ceremonial ticks
usage_moment: Use before opening the line and after any disruption that could invalidate readiness.
expected_output: A signed readiness record with open blockers, resolved blockers, and clear escalation for red conditions.
